CreditCardRepository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for the CreditCard collection in MongoDB.

Enum to represent different types of Credit Cards.

D

deleteCreditCard(String) - Method in class com.example.controller.PaymentController
Endpoint to delete a saved credit card.
deleteCreditCard(String) - Method in class com.example.service.PaymentService
Deletes a credit card by its card number.

F

findByCardNumber(String) - Method in interface com.example.repository.CreditCardRepository
Finds a CreditCard by its card number.
findByCreditCardRef(ObjectId) - Method in interface com.example.repository.TransactionRepository
Finds all Transactions by their associated credit card number.
findById(String) - Method in interface com.example.repository.TransactionRepository
Finds a Transaction by its ID.
findByOtpAndCreditCardIdAndExpiresAtAfter(String, String, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface com.example.repository.OTPRequestRepository
Finds an OTPRequest by its OTP value, associated CreditCard ID, and ensures that the OTP has not expired by comparing the current time with the expiresAt timestamp.
findByStatus(String) - Method in interface com.example.repository.TransactionRepository
Finds a Transaction by its status.
fraudCheck(String) - Method in class com.example.controller.PaymentController
Endpoint to check for potential fraud in a transaction.
fromString(String) - Static method in enum class com.example.model.CreditCardType
